name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, data discrepancies cause processing delays. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: delays in claims processing due to data reconciliation issues
features: manual data entry for claims and payments
